subject: 2BR showing
body: Hi, is the 2 bedroom apartment on Maple Street still available? I can tour tomorrow afternoon.

subject: Leak under sink
body: There is water leaking under my kitchen sink and it is getting worse. Can someone come today?

subject: Voucher question
body: Do you accept housing vouchers or Section 8? I want to apply if that is okay.

subject: Invoice follow up
body: Following up on invoice 4021 for the lock repair. Can you confirm when payment will be sent?

subject: Thanks
body: Thanks, I submitted the application and will wait for the next step.

subject: Attorney
body: My attorney told me to put this in writing. I am going to sue if the mold is not handled immediately.

subject: Weekly activity summary
body: System generated report for leasing activity.

subject: Pet policy
body: I have an emotional support animal. What documents do you need?

subject: Parking
body: Is parking included with the apartment? Also, is there laundry in the building?

subject: No heat
body: The heat has been off since last night and it is very cold in the unit.
